parameters.query:
SELECT 
  c."chatbotId",
  c."chatbotMode",
  c."userId",
  c."provider",
  c."model",
  c."systemPrompt",
  c."temperature",
  c."maxTokens",
  u."includedMessages" AS "totalMessagesLimit",
  u."messagesUsedThisCycle" AS "messagesUsed",
  GREATEST(0, u."includedMessages" - u."messagesUsedThisCycle") AS "messagesRemaining",
  i."connected",
  i.config->>'pageToken' AS "pageToken",
  i.config->>'pageId' AS "pageId",
  i.config->>'pageName' AS "pageName",
  ec."productSheetId",
  ec."productSheetName",
  ec."orderSheetId",
  ec."orderSheetName",
  ec."steadfastEnabled",
  ec."steadfastApiKey",
  ec."steadfastSecretKey",
  ec."pathaoEnabled",
  ec."pathaoClientId",
  ec."pathaoClientSecret",
  ec."pathaoMerchantId"
FROM "Integration" i
JOIN "Chatbot" c ON i."chatbotId" = c."chatbotId"
JOIN "User" u ON c."userId" = u."userId"
LEFT JOIN "EcommerceConfig" ec ON ec."chatbotId" = c."chatbotId"
WHERE i.platform = 'facebook'
  AND i."connected" = true
  AND (u."includedMessages" - u."messagesUsedThisCycle") > 0
  AND i.config->>'pageId' = '{{ $json.body.entry[0].messaging[0].recipient.id || $json.body.entry[0].id }}';

INSERT INTO "ChatSession" ("id", "chatbotId", "sessionId", "platform", "guestName", "profilePhoto", "isActive", "createdAt", "updatedAt")
VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid()::text, 
  '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.chatbotId }}', 
  '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.sessionId }}', 
  'facebook', 
  '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.userName }}', 
  NULLIF('{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.profilePhoto }}', ''), 
  true, 
  NOW(), 
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT ("chatbotId", "sessionId") 
DO UPDATE SET 
  "updatedAt" = NOW(), 
  "guestName" = '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.userName }}',
  "profilePhoto" = NULLIF('{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.profilePhoto }}', '');

INSERT INTO "ChatMessage" ("id", "chatbotId", "userId", "sessionId", "role", "content", "timestamp")
VALUES 
  (gen_random_uuid()::text, '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.chatbotId }}', '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.userId }}', '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.sessionId }}', 'user', '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.messageText }}', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 second'),
  (gen_random_uuid()::text, '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.chatbotId }}', '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.userId }}', '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.sessionId }}', 'assistant', '{{ $('Brain').item.json.output }}', NOW());

UPDATE "User"
SET "messagesUsedThisCycle" = "messagesUsedThisCycle" + 1
WHERE "userId" = '{{ $('Extract Fields').item.json.userId }}';

UPDATE "ChatSession" 
SET 
  "sentiment" = '{{ $json.sentiment }}', 
  "topic" = '{{ $json.topic }}',
  "analysisAt" = NOW()
WHERE "chatbotId" = '{{ $node["Fetch Bot Config"].json.chatbotId }}' 
  AND "sessionId" = '{{ $node["Extract Fields"].json.sessionId }}';

nodes.name: Add sentiment and topic in database

options.systemMessage: মেমোরিতে থাকা কনভারসেশনটি এনালাইজ করে আমাকে এর sentiment (positive/neutral/negative) এবং একটি ২ শব্দের topic দাও। শুধু JSON ফরম্যাটে উত্তর দাও।

assignments.name: imageDescription
assignments.value: =User sent an image. Here is what the image contains: {{ $json.content.parts[0].text }}. Please answer based on this image description.

parameters.toolDescription: Search uploaded source documents for general info, FAQs, and company policies. Do NOT use this for product catalog queries (price, stock, color, size, material) — use 'Get Product form Sheet' tool for those.

parameters.jsCode:
const od = $('Detect Order Action').item.json.orderData;
const cfg = $('Fetch Bot Config').item.json;
return [{ json: {
  recipient_name: od.recipient_name,
  recipient_phone: od.recipient_phone,
  recipient_address: od.recipient_address,
  cod_amount: od.cod_amount,
  product_name: od.product_name || 'Product',
  invoice: `ORD-${Date.now()}`,
  orderSheetId: cfg.orderSheetId,
  orderSheetName: cfg.orderSheetName || 'Orders',
  steadfastEnabled: cfg.steadfastEnabled,
  steadfastApiKey: cfg.steadfastApiKey,
  steadfastSecretKey: cfg.steadfastSecretKey,
  pathaoEnabled: cfg.pathaoEnabled,
  pathaoClientId: cfg.pathaoClientId,
  pathaoClientSecret: cfg.pathaoClientSecret,
  pageToken: cfg.pageToken,
  pageId: cfg.pageId,
  senderId: $('Extract Fields').item.json.senderId
} }];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  c."chatbotId",
  c."userId",
  c."model",
  c."systemPrompt",
  c."temperature",
  c."maxTokens",
  GREATEST(0, u."includedMessages" - u."messagesUsedThisCycle") AS "messagesRemaining",
  i."integrationId",
  i.config->>'pageToken' AS "pageToken",
  i.config->>'pageId' AS "pageId",
  i.config->>'pageName' AS "pageName",
  i.config->'commentReply' AS "commentReplyConfig"
FROM "Integration" i
JOIN "Chatbot" c ON i."chatbotId" = c."chatbotId"
JOIN "User" u ON c."userId" = u."userId"
WHERE i.platform = 'facebook'
  AND i."connected" = true
  AND i.config->>'pageId' = '{{ $('Get Facebook Message').item.json.body.entry[0].id }}';

parameters.toolDescription: Use this tool to look up real-time product information from the product catalog. Call this tool FIRST whenever the customer asks about any product - name, price, color, size, stock availability, material, description, or any product-related inquiry. Translate/map any Bengali or Banglish queries to English product names before searching or matching items from the sheet (e.g. if customer asks 'অলিভ গ্রিন', look for 'Olive Green Casual'). This tool returns live data directly from the seller's product sheet.

main.node: Add sentiment and topic in database
